        -- Thus, (∠PBA + ∠PCB + ∠PAC) + (∠PAB + ∠PBC + ∠PCA) = π

      -- From the three triangle angle sums:
      -- (∠PAB + ∠PBA) + (∠PBC + ∠PCB) + (∠PCA + ∠PAC) + (∠APB + ∠BPC + ∠CPA) = 3π
      -- But ∠APB + ∠BPC + ∠CPA = 2π, so the rest sums to π.

      -- Therefore, both groups sum to π/2? No, actually they sum to π together.

      sorry
    linarith
  linarith
